At $588.66 (2026-07-09 close), the base case yields -8.99% per year over seven years. Marvin proposes watch until price offers a mid-teens annual return on filing-based owner cash. We expect **-8.99%** per year over 7 years at **~$588.66** on **$7.05/sh** starting owner cash.

risk_claims.claim: DICKERSON GARY E reported an insider sale of 78,291 shares ($55,528,238).
*Primary risk: WFE spending rolls over while the stock still trades near a peak-cycle multiple on record owner cash, producing negative returns even if absolute cash flow remains high.
Customer concentration: two customers were 19% and 15% of FY2025 revenue; a capex pause at either fab hurts disproportionately.
